_comment: WORKED EXAMPLE — C94 real values derived from output/sift_proposals_c94.json S221 locked slate. NOT the canonical exemplar (that's dispatch_canonical_example.json with placeholders per ADR-0006 Contract A). This file shows the schema filled with real data so human readers can see what a real dispatch looks like. /sift v2 emits a file shaped like this for live runs.

articles.headline: The Town
articles.voiceDirective: Business analytical, multi-domain — the ownership-ecosystem read of the cycle
articles.spine: Ownership ecosystem — Civis Systems names A's stadium / Varek courts Paulson / Baylight Phase 11

threeLayerKeys.engine: INIT-006 Baylight construction-active 11 cycles; EventAttractiveness -4.0 Jack London/Downtown
threeLayerKeys.simulation: Civis Systems Field — The Town naming; Varek tech-expo Paulson recruitment quote
threeLayerKeys.userActions: Mike-typed Oakland_Sports_Feed canon rows 146 + 147 + civic Baylight Authority Phase II briefing

articles.headline: The Vote That Was There
articles.voiceDirective: Civic affairs, callback frame — structural sister-piece to your own C93 lead
articles.spine: Transit Hub 8-0 — the vote that converted from C93's failed-fire

threeLayerKeys.engine: INIT-003 phase advances vote-ready → vote-passed; NextActionCycle 94 → 95
threeLayerKeys.simulation: 8-0 vote tally; Mam-language deliverables in-scope; Tran D2 conditional → firm YES
threeLayerKeys.userActions: Soria Dominguez 3-point deliverable; Vega procedural confirmation; Mara directive closed

articles.headline: West Oakland: Cleared and Still
articles.voiceDirective: Open at a stoop, stay there — neighborhood texture that doesn't route through council vote

threeLayerKeys.engine: RetailVitality 5.50 lowest in city; Sentiment -0.06 lowest; CULTURE crisis-spike 45 second cycle
threeLayerKeys.userActions: OPP-004 commitment; C95 audit data bundle in prep; Okoro escalation Stab Fund processing

articles.headline: Adams Point Opens Doors
articles.voiceDirective: Scene piece — who's in the building, who's at the door, what's the texture of a church that decides to open without being asked
articles.spine: Faith atmospheric — first clean post-canon.2 faith piece

threeLayerKeys.engine: Adams Point UMC crisis-response medium-severity FAITH event
threeLayerKeys.simulation: Congregation opens doors; Adams Point Sentiment +0.02
threeLayerKeys.userActions: Canon.2 faith Tier-3 scrub closed S218 — first clean cycle for FAITH coverage

articles.headline: Kelley In Focus, Kelley Catches Fire
articles.voiceDirective: Cultural-history-meets-current-moment, your frame — the TV feature airing as a player about to leave goes off
articles.spine: A's free-agent transition — Kelley feature airs as he heats up

threeLayerKeys.engine: Kelley FA 2042 per truesource; A's record 21-4 → 23-5 swing
threeLayerKeys.simulation: Kelley 7h/1hr/5rbi in series loss; 'Isley Kelley: In Focus' TV feature; Keane 8-game hitting streak
threeLayerKeys.userActions: Mike-typed Oakland_Sports_Feed canon row 148 + row 145 free-agent framing

articles.headline: The Let-Walks Coming
articles.voiceDirective: Fan-emotional, your range — faces-of-the-franchise question when ownership picks youth
articles.spine: A's free-agent transition — Kelley/Aitken/Richards not coming back

threeLayerKeys.engine: Kelley/Aitken/Richards FA 2042; truesource story #2 generational handoff; story #7 Richards coverage gap
threeLayerKeys.simulation: Front-office source quote; fan sentiment LOW; Aitken civic-presence pattern E89 + E93
threeLayerKeys.userActions: Mike-typed Oakland_Sports_Feed canon row 145 free-agent rumor

articles.headline: Reyna's Two-Homer Night
articles.voiceDirective: Game piece — let line scores carry the frame; the let-walks story is in P Slayer's lane
articles.spine: Youth movement on the field — Reyna debut HRs, Coles ERA 1.13

threeLayerKeys.engine: Reyna prospect status per truesource; A's record 23-5 W1
threeLayerKeys.simulation: Reyna 3h/2hr/2rbi; JR Rosada call-up homer; Coles 7 IP / 3 ER / 9 SO / 5th win / 1.13 ERA

spine: Ownership ecosystem — Civis Systems names A's stadium 'Civis Systems Field — The Town', Varek courts Paulson for Oaks GM, Baylight construction phase 11 cycles building the stadium; one private network shaping Oakland's two pro franchises and the district they'll play in.
notes: Hand-derived from output/sift_proposals_c94.json S221 locked slate to demonstrate v2 dispatch shape. C94 ran v1.2 hand-execution and did NOT emit a dispatch.json — this file is retrospective worked example, not the actual artifact emitted at run time.
